book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve italian food and should be in the centre
The restaurant should be in the cheap price range
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 1 people at 15:30 on tuesday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 4 and should be in the same price range as the restaurant
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 3 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
